Document:
# The Great Turnover (2812) As the war rages on, civilian support gradually drops due to the exploitation that occurred during the war which became more brutal with each passing day, to the point where the Coalition resorted to deploying kamikaze tactics, while the SD deployed automated combat vessels instead due to resources and manpower becoming scarce. Both sides of the factions had attempted to recruit the locals to aid their cause, but due to the impacts they have caused, only a handful are interested in aiding them.
The worst has yet to come as in the last months of the year the locals of Venmar-7C are returning from their voyage to celebrate their home planet's revolution to the local sun. The Imperial Coalition and the Solarian Directive's incursion starts there, trapping the 7 civilian cruise liners to be trapped in the crossfire.
Solarian Directive, in their reckless desperation decided that they want to end the incursion as fast as they can by deploying swarms of combat drones directly toward the Coalition ship's formation, where the directive is to destroy all vessels in the vicinity disregarding the civilian ships present in the AO. The result of the operation caused 5 out of 7 civilian ships that were carrying hundreds of civilians to be decimated in an instant along with 60% of the Coalition's ships. The mass casualty of the civilian cruise liners triggered a massive uproar against both sides, cutting their support from the war effort, and the invaders that once promised them independence and peace. This action brought about the formation of the local militia group called Civilian Defense Force (CDF) for independence. This evolved the war into a 3-way war between Solarian Directive, The Imperial Coalition, and the CDF.
